name: Barbeque Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients except lemon juice and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it comes to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat to low and stir in the lemon juice and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Continue cooking for 5-10 minutes or until heated through.
5. Allow the sauce to cool slightly before serving.
6. Pour the sauce over skinned and cleaned chicken.
7. Cook the chicken in a crockpot on low for 4-6 hours, or on high for 2-3 hours.
Variations:
1. Use 1 can tomato sauce and add 2 tablespoons sugar.
2. Use slightly less butter or no butter at all; the chicken's own fat will provide enough richness.
3. Add 1/2 teaspoon packed brown sugar to enhance flavor.
